title: make test requires Python 3.9 - a minor tweak for 3.8

features.name: python_builtin_generic_type_annotation
features.description: Code should include type annotations using builtin generic syntax (list[str], dict[str, int]) only when targeting Python 3.9+. For cross-version compatibility, use typing.List[str] or add 'from __future__ import annotations' to defer evaluation.
